downstream_impacted.reason: will add agents/query/test_synthesizer_citations.py exercising SynthesizerResult.unknown_citations() for the hallucinated-citation rejection case; this run only builds the extraction building block, no behavior change expected in synthesizer.py itself for 4.5.2 unless it needs the same method (already exposed).

no_impact: agents/query/topic_selector.py (read-only precedent, not modified; file_id->markdown concatenation remains unbuilt/out of scope, consistent with 4.5.1's own impacted-modules list)
agents/llm/* (consumed via existing LLMClient contract only, no changes)
engine/ (Go side untouched; no RPC wiring for this subtask)
risk_notes: LLD (docs/LLD/query-agent.md) does not specify a file-path header format or LLM response wire format; both are disclosed choices documented in architecture-discovery.md and the module docstring.
Citation validation/rejection logic itself is explicitly deferred to subtask 4.5.2; this run only ensures the extracted citation list is complete/correct so 4.5.2 can build on it.
